hero.subtitle: We build custom automations that connect your apps, handle repetitive tasks, and run your business in the background — 24/7, without human error.

whatIsAutomation.title: Your Business on Autopilot
whatIsAutomation.subtitle: Workflow automation means connecting your apps and tools so they talk to each other and complete tasks automatically — no manual work needed.
whatIsAutomation.analogy: Think of it like hiring an invisible employee who works 24/7, never makes mistakes, costs almost nothing, and handles all your boring repetitive tasks — instantly.

before.title: Without Automation
items: Manually copy-pasting data between apps every day
Forgetting to follow up with leads
Spending hours on reports you could generate in seconds
Missing important notifications while you sleep
Doing the same 10 steps every time an order comes in
Your team wasting time on tasks a computer could do

after.title: With Automation
items: Data flows automatically between all your apps
Follow-ups sent instantly without you lifting a finger
Reports generated and delivered on schedule
Get notified on WhatsApp the moment something important happens
Orders processed, confirmed, and tracked automatically
Your team focused on work that actually needs humans

whoIsThisFor.title: If You Recognize Yourself Here, You Need This
whoIsThisFor.subtitle: Automation isn't just for big companies. Anyone drowning in repetitive tasks can benefit.

audiences.title: Businesses & Agencies
audiences.subtitle: SMEs, marketing agencies, service companies
pains: Manually updating spreadsheets after every sale
Chasing leads that fall through the cracks
Your team spending half their day on admin tasks
Clients not getting timely updates or reports
gains: Sales data synced to CRM automatically
Lead follow-ups sent the moment they sign up
Admin work handled without your team
Automated reports delivered to clients on schedule

audiences.title: Individuals & Freelancers
audiences.subtitle: Content creators, solopreneurs, remote workers
pains: Posting the same content on every platform manually
Inbox overflowing with emails you never get to
Forgetting to invoice clients on time
Tracking tasks and deadlines across too many tools
gains: Emails auto-sorted, replied to, and flagged
Invoices sent automatically on the right date
All tasks synced in one place automatically

audiences.title: E-commerce Stores
audiences.subtitle: Online shops, dropshippers, product sellers
pains: Manually confirming every order on WhatsApp
No system to follow up with abandoned carts
Inventory updates done by hand across platforms
Customer queries piling up without quick replies
gains: Inventory synced across all sales channels
AI handles common customer questions instantly

whatWeAutomate.title: What We Can Automate For You
whatWeAutomate.subtitle: Click any category to see real examples. If you can describe the task, we can probably automate it.
whatWeAutomate.drawerCtaSubtitle: We'll have it live for you within 48 hours.
whatWeAutomate.bottomText: Don't see your use case? We build fully custom automations for any workflow.

categories.title: Social Media Automation
categories.description: Schedule, publish, and repurpose content across all platforms without manual effort.
examples: Auto-post to Instagram, Facebook & LinkedIn from one place
Turn a blog post into 5 social media captions automatically
Cross-post YouTube videos to all platforms with custom captions
Schedule a week of content in one sitting

categories.title: Lead & CRM Automation
categories.description: Capture leads automatically, follow up instantly, and never let a prospect fall through the cracks.
examples: Facebook Lead Ad → instant WhatsApp message to the lead
Website form → add to CRM + assign to sales rep + send welcome email
No reply in 3 days → auto follow-up reminder
Won deal → auto-create invoice and onboarding task

categories.title: Inbox & Email Automation
categories.description: Sort, reply, extract, and act on emails automatically so your inbox stays under control.
examples: Auto-reply to common customer questions
Extract order details from emails → save to Google Sheets
Flag urgent emails and send a WhatsApp alert
Auto-unsubscribe and archive promotional emails

categories.title: Reporting & Data Sync
categories.description: Generate reports, sync spreadsheets, and deliver summaries automatically on schedule.
examples: Daily sales summary sent to WhatsApp every morning at 9am
Auto-sync WooCommerce orders to Google Sheets
Weekly performance report emailed to your team every Monday
Real-time dashboard updated as new data comes in

categories.title: E-commerce Operations
categories.description: Automate your entire order lifecycle — from placement to delivery to review collection.
examples: New order → WhatsApp confirmation to customer
Low stock → alert sent to manager + reorder triggered
Order delivered → auto-request review via WhatsApp
Abandoned cart → 3-step follow-up sequence

categories.title: Client Onboarding
categories.description: Make every new client feel welcome without doing it manually each time.
examples: Payment received → welcome email + contract sent automatically
New client → create project in Notion + assign team member
Onboarding checklist sent with due dates auto-set
7-day check-in email sent automatically after signup

categories.title: Content Repurposing
categories.description: Turn one piece of content into many, distributed everywhere, automatically.
examples: Blog post → Twitter thread + LinkedIn post + Instagram caption
YouTube video → transcript → summary → social snippets
Podcast episode → show notes + quotes + audiogram
Newsletter → WhatsApp broadcast message

categories.title: Notifications & Alerts
categories.description: Get the right information at the right time, delivered to where you actually look.
examples: New Google review → instant Slack and WhatsApp notification
Server downtime → SMS + WhatsApp alert within seconds
Competitor price change → daily monitoring report
New mention of your brand online → instant alert

recipes.title: Popular Automation Recipes
recipes.subtitle: Pre-built automation templates our clients love most. Pick one and we'll set it up for you — usually within 48 hours.
recipes.bottomText: Want something not listed? We build fully custom recipes for your exact workflow.

items.title: WhatsApp Order Confirmation
items.description: Every new order triggers an instant WhatsApp message to the customer with order details and estimated delivery.
steps: New order placed on WooCommerce/Shopify
Order details extracted automatically
Personalised WhatsApp message sent instantly

items.title: Auto Social Media Poster
items.description: Write one post and have it automatically published across Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn at the best times.
steps: Add content to a shared Google Sheet or Notion
Automation formats for each platform
Posts published at scheduled times automatically

items.title: Lead Capture → WhatsApp Follow-Up
items.description: When someone fills your Facebook or website form, they get a WhatsApp message within seconds and are added to your CRM.
steps: Lead submits Facebook Lead Ad or website form
Lead saved to Google Sheets or CRM
Personalised WhatsApp follow-up sent in under 60 seconds

items.title: Daily Sales Report on WhatsApp
items.description: Every morning at 9am, receive a complete sales summary for the previous day — directly on WhatsApp.
steps: Scheduled trigger fires every morning at 9am
Sales data pulled from WooCommerce or Sheets
Formatted summary sent to your WhatsApp

items.title: Abandoned Cart Recovery
items.description: Customers who leave without buying get a 3-step automated follow-up over 48 hours — email, then WhatsApp.
steps: Cart abandoned detected after 1 hour
Email reminder sent with cart contents
WhatsApp follow-up sent if no purchase after 24h

items.title: Blog to Social Content Pipeline
items.description: Publish a blog post and get AI-generated social captions for 5 platforms, ready to post or auto-scheduled.
steps: New blog post published on WordPress
OpenAI generates platform-specific captions
Posts auto-scheduled across all platforms

items.title: Client Onboarding Sequence
items.description: New client payment received? Welcome email, contract, Notion workspace, and task assignments all happen automatically.
steps: Payment confirmed via bKash or Stripe
Welcome email + contract sent automatically
Notion project created and team notified on Slack

items.title: Post-Delivery Review Request
items.description: After every order is marked delivered, a personalised review request is automatically sent to the customer via WhatsApp.
steps: Order status updated to 'Delivered'
3-day delay before sending
Friendly review request sent via WhatsApp with direct link

items.title: Brand Mention Alert System
items.description: Get instant WhatsApp or Slack alerts whenever your brand, product, or keywords are mentioned online.
steps: Web monitoring tracks mentions in real-time
New mention detected and filtered
Instant alert sent with source and context
